projectDescription: A Homebrew tap providing pre-built PHP extensions for PHP 5.6 through 8.6 on macOS and Linux.
keyFeatures: Pre-built PHP extensions for PHP 5.6 to 8.6
Support for macOS (Intel x86_64 and Apple arm64) and Linux (x86_64)
60+ PHP extensions including xdebug, redis, imagick, swoole, grpc, and more
Automated CI/CD builds and bottle publishing via GitHub Actions
Compatible with both shivammathur/php and homebrew/core PHP taps
Auto-configures extensions via INI files in PHP conf.d directory
publicApiSurface: AbstractPhpExtension — base Ruby class for all extension formulae
AbstractPhpExtension.init — initializes formula class with PHP version and extension name
AbstractPhpExtension#safe_phpize — runs phpize with correct autoconf environment
AbstractPhpExtension#write_config_file — writes extension INI config to PHP conf.d
AbstractPhpExtension#patch_spl_symbols — patches SPL symbol references for compatibility
